What's going on everyone? First thing you're going to do to start selling supplements is you actually need to have an account. So you look at the URL, top bar right there, says distributor.preciouslabs.com. Boom, we're going to go there. It's going to say log in. You are not a person. You are a person. You're not a distributor yet. So say new distributor. Click there, which is sign up. All right. Now, we're going to put our name in. So for me, I'm going to sign Layla up, because I'm already in the system. All right. And she's going to be. Let's make her Layla.mosey. Cool. Cool. And then what you're going to do when you get to this thing is you're going to open this up into a new tab. I just right clicked. We'll take you to this lovely DocuSign form. You'll type in your name again. You will not type my wife's name in, because that will not be used for you. All right. Cool. Begin signing. And I'm not going to fill this one out with you guys, because I don't want to waste your time. But you're going to fill out these five things. OK. So it's just your name, your business name, the address of the business. Shoot. Oops. And then your business's EIN number. OK. So that's the one that you got from the IRS. It says EIN on the top right. It's what you pay your taxes with. It's in your Articles of Incorporation. You will sign this puppy, and then you'll click Finish. Once it gets finished, it will send you an email to the email that you just typed in earlier. And it will send you a document. OK. And so then what you will do is you go back here, and then you will choose that document probably from your downloads. And then you will upload it like this. Very, very straightforward. And you'll do the same thing with the agreement form for the distributor agreement, which basically says that you're not going to do anything shady. And we won't do anything shady either.
